examples: A leakage of kerosene has polluted water supplies.
"What if there is no kerosene this winter?" said Al.—"So what?" she said. "We still have electricity."
With a flash, the kerosene lamp went out.
So it is all pouring kerosene on your strengths and differentiating yourself for the long haul.
Consumption even of kerosene, the cause of the 1998 riots, mostly increases with income.
